_publications._publicationTitle: Merlin deficiency predicts FAK inhibitor sensitivity: a synthetic lethal relationship.

_contextSnippet: Overall, Aldefluor+ cells had ~35-fold higher tumor-initiating potential than Aldefluor− cells (p<0.0001)...these data validate Aldefluor as a tumor-initiating cell/CSC marker in MPM
details: Validated as CSC marker in MPM through tumor initiation, self-renewal, and differentiation assays; Aldefluor+ cells had ~35-fold higher tumor-initiating potential than Aldefluor- cells (p<0.0001)
